title: Noah Lucas homepage v038 archetype and hero alignment
changeSummary: Uses the requested hero sentence and keeps only the name, hero line, and Get in Touch / LinkedIn actions in the opening panel.
Renames Product Leadership System to Archetype and combines the operating motion with the breadth-and-depth profile.
Rewrites the archetype as Frontier systems: product architect and operator, turning ambiguous technical capability into trusted products, repeatable operating motions, and business outcomes.
Makes the operating motion a readable snake path: requirements turn down, then the lower row runs back through build, validate, adoption, and operate.
Keeps breadth and depth distinct from the motion: breadth is cross-company leadership; depth is physical AI and mission-critical data infrastructure.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local source validation plus public staging browser check after GitHub Pages deployment.
